text.title: X / Twitter Ads Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-vertical-fit
step.action: Confirm vertical is B2B / tech / crypto / media. Otherwise STOP.
step.decision-gate: If mismatch, route to Meta or LinkedIn methodology.

step.name: pick-audience-mode
step.action: Follower-LAL if ≥1000 source; else keyword / conversation.

step.name: set-kpi-and-viewability
step.action: Lock target CPC + viewability 50% floor; auto-pause below.
